results.matched_effect_cluster: Frequency Bands in RoPE per-head usage
results.justification: ICLR 2026 paper directly analyses per-head preferential band usage in RoPE — twin of XALAM-FREQ observation.
EXACT TWIN — Mixed-Frequency RoPE assigns head-specific elite RoPE-frequency sets via greedy search. Direct functional twin of XALAM-FREQ per-head pre-allocation.
Q-ROAR partitions channels into contiguous log-frequency bands with per-band rescaling — direct functional twin.
Below threshold — different mechanism (dropping vs partitioning).
Below threshold — spectral features for detection, not attention allocation.
Spectral rank utilization at width scale covers band-partition perspective.
Per-band attention design for spectral processing — same paradigm at speech layer.
Head specialisation variants cover per-head pre-allocation pattern.
